◎简　　介  

　　The distillation of Scotch whiskey, whose Gaelic name means "water of life," is a centuries-old practice. Journey to the Scottish countryside to uncover the history of the craft and meet some of the biggest names in the industry in a revealing look at how Scotch became the premiere spirit of choice around the globe.
